textByHash.02e6044a0b9b12ccc999b7d6569dc4a9b081a930: You go to Yu'biusk? What you see?
textByHash.0404be9304f21d25567e5210f8a03987f4bb1017: Long ago we fight other people: beardy-short-people, pointy-hat-short-people, tall people with keen blades. Other people build cities with walls, and we not able to attack them any more.
textByHash.0428f82d73b7027a8bf1136ff5085723b2857f6c: I was a crew member on board a ship sailing out of Fortis. We got caught in a storm and sailed too close to the rocks around Shipwreck Cove. I'm sure you can guess the results...
textByHash.0752a351ab1c66e29573e4c309999bd015c2abf5: You tell me, I'm no warrior. That said, I did hear that they'd managed to turn some of our own golems against us. If they can do that, I fear what else they may do.
textByHash.1537119e300e2ca594de086effa66db7d7f12532: On the horizon! Do you see it?
textByHash.1847d0383e05b5db5f52f321007255dfc09a1f44: It seems they have been promised a new home here in return for wiping us out. We must take great care. We may be fighting for our home, but it seems they are as well.
textByHash.20288cb344aeff5160436b230601a558c381aa95: Normally, undead goblin high priests cannot be destroyed, but there is ancient goblin combat ritual.
textByHash.2081a46ebf9923025ec7281217dcc948a5a1981e: It rain many days. But rain not stop goblins. Goblin feet churn up ground with rain and goblin blood. All ground turn to mud. That why it called Battle of Plain of Mud.
textByHash.21dbf46fc752b81bbe9f40bd41cedfe37c7dfe3b: Thank you! I know Big High War God still care for us! I wait for him here. Someday he take me to Yu'biusk to live with him.
textByHash.24e3466c513624ba4f1fa619ed064ce6643f073c: Come on, you monster! Just finish me!
textByHash.26dc5a817662a0cb11298ffe9880be052ba790db: We are waiting for you to join us.
textByHash.278f68144feaad2ba6bb2e6364b6225d60d423a3: You must defeat high priests without using any weapons, armour or spells. Once you have bones, take them to Yu'biusk and bury them there.
textByHash.294e0008c1baa45ee95c8e9d6e88739e3ab7e943: Other races, they run away from mighty goblin army! Chosen Commander make goblins build siege machines and they break down walls of cities. Then goblins march in and kill everyone!
textByHash.2d3f51bba7f093ecbec446df2d994020319e2b76: That salvager, Jasper, hopefully still has it. I'm sure you'll find him with the rest of his people. They live to the east of here.
textByHash.2d74e8105b223496f9f87e9ab28bdea39c569d34: Ah, there you are. Dire news I'm afraid. We've lost all contact with the capital. Worse, another dwarven clan has joined the Saradominists. They march upon the fortress as we speak.
textByHash.319a5b8aa86ecea54fc4e434790712c4a68e513c: Battle last many days. Both sides same size, none win, none lose. Goblin bodies everywhere. Many dead.
textByHash.31a2b137dd7cfc8b2830e3d52493568d305a53b2: I don't want to die like this!
textByHash.32420487b664788e2b22b0973467bc5c2b348e40: I think I know now... I know why I stayed behind. It was for this. Thank you. I think it's time for me to go now. Tell Bernard I will always be with him...
textByHash.3478b5bb5aa609834faf5d2a04ed169f01633ed6: Me Hopespear of Narogoshuun tribe. Who you?
textByHash.347afa100d652cf0f9b8ced62b6e29b6e0218184: He say, 'Stop the fighting!' He say, 'Fighting good, but not if all my followers die! You must not fight one another so much you all die!'
textByHash.3619874628720a4b408a34c4a9bb4a6a9d35d3e9: Even so... Yu'biusk is place of Big High War God. Land of Goblins. It where goblins should go.
textByHash.37feb52a857e7a442e47e6cf1311c22c9bed0f73: You not goblin. What you want here?
textByHash.406798e507a51839e7927660cbd7f2af30799c60: You can? You can! How wonderful! It has been a long while since anyone came by that could understand what I wanted to say to them. You wouldn't happen to have a moment to help me out would you?
textByHash.411e15b2b9fc05d432a9c37c2106f30af336f6a2: Oh no. I'd hoped he wouldn't sell it on so quickly. Maybe there's still hope though. Any mountain climber around here will surely be heading up the Proudspire...
textByHash.42ed94073865fe8064f6fc9b2da044658f486fb8: Goblins write my vision down in goblin holy book, along with history of goblins and commandments of Big High War God.
textByHash.4338d23d727fcdf03b593c48958d6a720c7efab7: Get the women and children to the boats!
textByHash.4d258f069db38a6e600970270e4223c8f27be23a: Yes, he is gone from this place. You did a great thing removing him.
textByHash.4ebe3334aed4911a13a43c49e22f15b687c08fb3: Me think, when me die, Big High War God take me to reward in Yu'biusk. Every day great battle, every night great victory with feasting.
textByHash.4f31421bbcee46ed6258a72b843e1be81f6fe25d: There not enough food for all tribes, so tribes with no food attack tribes who have food. Goblin war last many many years. Finally all tribes meet at this place, where temple is now.
textByHash.502bbe61d5591eef320a3f290bdc7ca14ce3eb43: Wasteland? No goblins fighting glorious battles?
textByHash.5113f8829e5e8be31aad2704a9242d09e2aba376: Goodness you are a fool! Their leader is named Yonrith Lovakengj. He has fled to the west with his closest allies, but much of his army still remains. Carnifex Maximus Vardorvis is in pursuit of him.
textByHash.520144823fbcd1396ddcc3c52bd8f1518398004a: If you can go to Yu'biusk, you can take their bones and bury them there. Will you do this for me?
textByHash.61cc957be104db5815f3c5abefbbe19ce883a62c: Hello again. Have you got any leads on my necklace yet?
textByHash.66bf8b38bf989ef64a8481c9d4eb9bcd783bd897: Ah, so that is why you return. I can assist you in that and give you another.
textByHash.6ac8eb775db61811f2e6dd096639df099c3341d9: It took me too long to get out of there... Just don't send me back!
textByHash.727eb7809bc9ded6139f44ea8fb393be647ac04b: Hello? Perhaps you can understand me? If you can hear me that is?
textByHash.7300942161b300bd433119d7ce3ca7a0acc15531: Did you not hear me? Do I need to spell it out for you?
textByHash.7962712b366d05f821ac79ac5011f6f6e75397ea: You take bones to Yu'biusk yet?
textByHash.79afcfc415d9a8adf107fc54b21eb6791e76e9d2: You please do this for me, human. Remember, you must defeat high priests without using any weapons, armour or spells.
textByHash.7a392d3afec5cd448dc100d678d3b431b8c87d5c: Thank you. Not many humans like you. Now goblin high priests can rest.
textByHash.7dc3f559fd378e6574ced152c2473f4e48afdb1f: You there! Seek out the centurion at once. Inform him that the enemy leader has been identified and the Carnifex Maximus himself has been dispatched to bring back his head!
textByHash.866015346ba204adf00d56c01576a7d5e7f95d85: Useless! Perhaps the headsman needs to take your head as well. I will find the centurion myself!
textByHash.869d4867e7013dbb5e1c28f143c26900ca6acb60: Me should know better than to ask human to do favour for dead goblin.
textByHash.88a69b74b531466426c743f5c317f8d79e56535d: Big High War God not come, but me have faith. Someday Big High War God come for me, take me to him. Until then me hang on, not let go into death.
textByHash.928482082cf3cbfe86d9d70962cd2700254186e0: In meantime, will you do me favour?
textByHash.96ccf9236cdabd33ad3adea026a3002692421936: Who I was does not matter. Now, I am a guardian for the Shadow Realm and I am protecting this area from any more disturbances.
textByHash.98e8bdccd318ea8839c6787ed989b35f9689f0f8: I see Chosen Commander in dream. He wear shining armour and stand at front of army of goblins. Behind Chosen Commander, goblins stretch to horizon. Many goblins, too many to count.
textByHash.9e57e11b8697012a0ee437fc396e6fff6c9519b5: Me think Chosen Commander will be great goblin general, but Big High War God chose me to have vision, not great general, so Chosen Commander could be anyone.
textByHash.a029df7f71db6ea690a8268dda015e0a601d7107: You did? Were you able to get it back?
textByHash.a0cb5b3956577fb075b02602c6143a387ad79d41: There are those who walk in the Shadow Realm who should not.
textByHash.a3623a745dd4a8c2ce0d93278048189618bc1df2: Indeed. We have increased our offerings tenfold, but I fear they fall on empty ears. Perhaps our lord really has gone.
textByHash.a47f9ec364f1cc3eb2fba46d43f81794ffe9230b: I actually did the climb myself once. I promised my son we'd go up there again together, but we never found the time...
textByHash.a80e9fe3f3ef73b6ee6f14779d7a61247482366f: When gods go to war, goblin soldiers so good that Big High War God sell tribes to fight for different gods. Big High War God fight with other gods, sometimes for one, sometimes another.
textByHash.abe87e6c5f0bfbbd6c540bd875ce2d533553937e: Hmm. You're clearly confused. The lack of sleep is getting to you. Go and have a lie down and we will discuss this later.
textByHash.ac2cfcc116a8e66469eef3539240908e76a95621: Me chosen prophet of Big High War God. Before I have prophecy, goblin tribes fight one another very much.
textByHash.adbaa35c6796c4f9455a3b60b57ed0f7d505e577: Me not important general, not mighty sergeant. Me just normal goblin. But one night, me have dream.
textByHash.b0cb5fe2e66a928b6f91652480d057e3f9221425: The thing is though, after I died, I was not guided to Mictl. I remained, but in this form. I saw the remains of our ship, and I saw some of those salvagers from the east claiming whatever they wanted.
textByHash.b201514661e6fca7db29c06367b767eed29e2605: One of them took a diamond necklace from my body. It was very precious to me. It should not remain in the hands of a thief.
textByHash.b73d0b640e38915eea726789494ba41809e86650: Alright then. I'll meet you up there.
textByHash.bfd072c57c7417e4435f48b7bebe8d17647ecf41: Tell him I'm proud of him, and... tell him I'm sorry I never came home.
textByHash.c03ce6a2bbbbb9d36a11ac797301ce88cf90b66e: Don't send me back to that library!
textByHash.c5688fdab79250a33a5f15401931198c9177f809: Then I wake from dream. I know it true vision from Big High War God. I run to general of my tribe, and he call other generals for emergency meeting.
textByHash.c57c4999c0f49e3c501a97198eecaeb1dc1ff160: Me not know much more. In vision, Chosen Commander wear heavy armour and big helmet that cover face. Me not know what he look like. I see him give orders, but he far away so me not hear his voice.
textByHash.c59250ad4aa0d47b3f2cc9730630066fe4692d68: Other gods fight for their own reasons, but Big High War God fight for war itself!
textByHash.c8d145b205610b49e5efda5b0d8dac5dfa373c60: It's very unfortunate really. I died.
textByHash.ccb108bb76d094fe2b266197955df5cfb7050e11: Then generals set goblins to work building temple on site of battle. It sink into mud, so they turn it into underground temple, and keep it secret from others.
textByHash.d29a855b42e3bafe2d491249d4baef86e519ee59: Oh my gods, the dragon is coming back!
textByHash.d59e0370c541169bd894d9948282df613524af77: I've been doing some research into our new foes. Rumour has it they once lived in a great city in the far north. The city fell and now they are homeless.
textByHash.d66112c648eaf708e5632f32623120695c7cdf9f: Bernina! I don't think I did mention it. I haven't had to do an introduction for a while now!
textByHash.ddd553f25f9b3e00f30ffc503d1a3f93e11d7efc: Thank you. I heard the one that took it being called Jasper by one of his fellow salvagers. He is the one you will need to find.
textByHash.df8a8f210060cfd19726bc1af0189412d2819f55: You see me? You understand me?
textByHash.e1daca9e42da1ed04aff1b13154dc5c843889ddd: I see banners of every tribe. Banners of all tribes, even Dorgesh tribe.
textByHash.e35608c3f59bef87f9b149509615f4542a9825db: Is everything all right my friend? You don't seem to be yourself.
textByHash.e5768e7ff8e4238bd97b7af2ec3acaa8ec73f79a: Me see throne of Big High War God. He shine with light so bright me cannot see him, but me hear his voice.
textByHash.e64d75599ead7af1aa816dbf1d5e6cc68255a3d1: You were well rewarded for you effort. But you should leave this place, for it is not wise to tarry.
textByHash.ec3e44be964c4f1836d68d033fd2b922a4fff31e: He can't understand me. Please, , tell him who I am.
textByHash.ed5dbc35eee662da713c6ddd69e0e1dc466ae2d6: It's hopeless. We're all going to die!
textByHash.f4f58b488f3240d8e6cb465ce4a19a641c66e423: I tell all generals what I see. They decide to stop fighting so goblins not all die. By this time, so many had died that there enough food for all.
textByHash.f570bd1feb16e6000149cb190dde50b3afde4eda: And when all dead, Big High War God himself appear and sit on great throne of bronze and rule over all, with Chosen Commander beside him.
textByHash.f67798821edd2fec167edf0296062bd01ce19f29: Big High War God greatest of all gods! He take puny goblins from Yu'biusk and make them mighty warriors for great war of gods!
textByHash.f83e6819a5672ba57e0608841068fbc4487d92dc: Then he say, 'Today I cannot lead you, but some day I will send Chosen Commander to lead you.'
textByHash.fd68a36787235767e6138695cea798fc171621f3: High priests in this tomb, when they die they believe they go to Yu'biusk. But their spirits still here.
textByHash.fefb403c6e29581c198ee2201e560eadf5088e04: Me dead, but me not go. Long ago, me have vision of Big High War God. Me chosen prophet of Big High War God.
